description: India Book I, 3: Court proceedings dealing with the dispute between Yosef ha-Lebdi the India trader, and Yequtiʾel b. Moshe, 'the representative of merchants' in Fustat. The document deals with Lebdi's debt of 40 dinars to Yequtiʾel for a sale of indigo. The document is written in the hand of Netanel b. Yefet (though the title was written probably by Hillel b. Eli) and is dated February 22, 1098. Signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Shemu'el, Nissim b. Nahray ha-Rav, and Netanel b. Yefet.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
